Cofun LIVE酷玩直播採用領先業界的創新互動模式，讓直播主與玩家能夠實現零: Cofun LIVE adopts industry-leading, innovative interactive modes that enable streamers and players to achieve zero-latency interactive experiences, allowing synchronized game participation and real-time communication to create unprecedented immersion. Not only does it support multiple players online simultaneously, but it also features a cute visual style and an intuitive operational design, making it easy for both newcomers and experienced users to get started quickly and seamlessly integrate into the new entertainment scenario that combines live streaming with gaming.
在 Cofun LIVE，人人都能開播當主角，觀眾也能變直播主。: On Cofun LIVE, anyone can start streaming and become the star, players can become streamers too.
不只秀出自我，還能賺分潤，現在加入，一起Cofun起來！: On Cofun LIVE, everyone can start streaming and become a star, and players can also become streamers.
在 Cofun LIVE，不只是表演才藝，還能與粉絲即時互動、共玩遊戲，創造雙向: On Cofun LIVE, it's not just about showcasing talents, but also engaging in real-time interaction with fans and playing games together, creating a two-way entertainment experience!
讓你邊玩邊建立人氣，同時賺取實質收益，打造你的專屬直播舞台。: Building popularity while playing, earning substantial income at the same time, and creating your exclusive streaming stage.
50%起跳的分潤機制: Revenue Sharing Mechanism Starting from 50% and Up
加入直播不只是聊天打賞那麼簡單！在 Cofun LIVE，你能與喜愛的直播主同步: Joining live streams isn't just about chatting and tipping! On Cofun LIVE, you can play synchronously with your favorite streamers and complete challenging lunar journeys together. This isn't just interaction—it's an immersive experience that lets you enjoy the pride and thrill of conquering levels alongside streamers and reaching the moon together!
多款超值禮包限時放送中: Multiple Limited-Time Super Value Gift Packages Available Now
整合互動直播、即時遊戲與分潤機制，Cofun LIVE 打造一站式娛樂解決方案，: Integrating interactive live streaming, real-time gaming, and revenue-sharing mechanisms, Cofun LIVE creates a one-stop entertainment solution that delivers win-win value for both creators and players.
Cofun LIVE 不僅提供最低 50% 起的抖內分潤，更設有多元激勵機制，讓: Cofun LIVE not only offers revenue sharing starting from a minimum of 50%, but also features diverse incentive mechanisms that comprehensively upgrade creators' earnings.
開播超簡單，一支手機就能立即上線，開始你的直播之旅！: To start streaming is super simple—just one smartphone away, and you can go live instantly to begin your streaming journey!
你喜歡怎麼播，就怎麼播！風格自己決定，創意完全不設限。: Stream however you like! Decide your own style with absolutely no limits on creativity.
您的內容與收益，將受到業界領先的資安技術全方位保護，確保安心無虞。: Your content and earnings will be comprehensively protected by industry-leading cybersecurity technology, ensuring complete peace of mind.
透過公開互動機制，您不僅可以輕鬆與其他創作者互相認識、交流想法，更能建立實質連結: Through open interactive mechanisms, you can not only easily connect and exchange ideas with other creators, but also build meaningful relationships.
可以透過手機、平板電腦或電腦進行串流或觀看。任何設備均可存取。: You can stream or watch through mobile phones, tablets, or computers. Accessible on any device.
目前似乎沒有人上船: No one seems to be on board at the moment
本遊戲不涉及任何形式的現金交易賭博，並且不鼓勵、不支持也不容許用於賭博或其他違法: This game does not involve any form of cash gambling transactions and does not encourage, support, or permit use for gambling or other illegal purposes. Violators are responsible for their own actions. Users are required to comply with local laws and regulations.
直播、遊戲、多種獎勵，現在就一同前往Cofun LIVE！: Live streaming, games, multiple rewards—join Cofun LIVE now!

信箱、抬頭、統一編號為必填資訊。: Email, invoice title, and Unified Business Number are mandatory fields.

如何提領直播收益: How to Withdraw Live Streaming Earnings
完成提領審核區的驗證項目，以開通提領功能。: Complete the verification items in the withdrawal review section to enable the withdrawal function.
查看收益數據與前往提領。: Check Earnings Data and Proceed to Withdrawal.
確認收益數據後點選「前往提領」。: After checking your earnings data, click “Go to Withdraw”
點選A「我的收益」查看收益數據或直接點選B「提領」前往提領中心。: Click A. “My Earnings” to view your earnings data, or click B. “Withdraw” to go directly to the withdrawal center.
於「請輸入提領金額 (USD) 」欄位，輸入欲提領的金額 (以美元計算)，並點選: In the “Enter Withdrawal Amount (USD)” field, enter the amount you wish to withdraw (in USD) and click “Confirm Withdrawal.”
確認提領資訊後，請點選「確定」。: After confirming the withdrawal information, click “Confirm.”
可於「提領紀錄」查詢申請進度與狀態。: You can check your application progress and status under “Withdrawal Records.”
請至驗證過的電子郵件收件匣中查收標題為「Cofun Live 提領勞務報酬單」的: Please check your verified email inbox for the email titled “Cofun Live Withdrawal Labor Payment Form.”
請開啟附件並確認各項資訊及金額是否正確。: Please open the attachment and verify that all information and amounts are correct.
若確認無誤，請回覆信件「確認無誤」字樣，即會開始安排付款流程；如有任何疑問請直接: If everything is correct, please reply to this email with the words “Confirmed” to initiate the payment process. If you have any questions, please reply to this email directly.
請耐心等待，您可在「提領紀錄」中查看進度。: Please wait patiently. You can check the progress in “Withdrawal Records.”
於畫面上方的日期區塊，點擊您想查詢的紀錄。: On the top date section of the screen, click the record you want to check.
點選下方的「提領搜尋」，進入查詢界面。: Click “Withdrawal Search” at the bottom to enter the search interface.
在查詢界面中，選擇「提領狀態」，輸入時間區間並點擊「確定」查詢。: In the search interface, select “Withdrawal Status,” enter the time range, and click “Confirm” to search.
輸入您的【電話號碼】後，點選「發送驗證碼」，收到六位數驗證碼後填入，再點選「下一: Enter your [phone number], then click "Send Verification Code." After receiving the six-digit verification code, fill it in and click "Next."

請確認內容後，點選\n「許可」。: Please confirm the content, then click "Allow."
請選擇您的【地區】，並設定專屬【暱稱】【帳號】，填寫完成後請點選「下一步」。: Please select your [Region] and set your exclusive [Nickname] and [Account]. After completing the form, click "Next."

輸入您的【電話】後，點選「發送驗證碼」，收到六位數 驗證碼後填入，再點選「完成」: Enter your [Phone Number], then click "Send Verification Code." After receiving the six-digit verification code, fill it in and click "Complete."

請填寫您的【真實姓名】、【出生日期】、【性別】、【身分證字號/居留證號碼】，並上: Please fill in your [Real Name], [Date of Birth], [Gender], [National ID Number/Residence Certificate Number], and upload photos of both sides of your identification document. When complete, click "Proceed to Verification."
請選擇您的【稅務身分別】，並點選確認。: Please select your [Tax Status] and click Confirm.

在一個充滿創意與激情的世界裡，誕生了一個全新的遊戲品牌——{siteName}。: In a world full of creativity and passion, a brand new game brand has emerged — {siteName}.
{siteName}不僅僅是一個遊戲，它是玩家探索無限可能的入口。: {siteName} is not just one game, it's the gateway to endless possibilities for gamers to explore.
{siteName}致力於提供最獨特和創新的遊戲體驗，讓每一位玩家都能在這裡找到: {siteName} is dedicated to providing the most unique and innovative gaming experience, allowing every player to find their own adventure here.
{siteName}的獨特之處在於其創新的養成礦寵功能。: The uniqueness of {siteName} lies in its innovative pet breeding feature.
玩家可以在遊戲中收集和培育自己的礦寵，這些礦寵擁有各自獨特的技能和特性。: Players can collect and nurture their own mining pets in the game, each with unique skills and traits.
通過不斷的培育和進化，礦寵將成為玩家在遊戲世界中的得力助手，陪伴玩家一同冒險和挑: Through continuous nurturing and evolution, these pets will become valuable companions for players in their adventures and challenges.
除了令人愛不釋手的礦寵功能，{siteName}還擁有多種遊戲類型，其中SLOT: Besides the captivating pet breeding feature, {siteName} offers various game types, with SLOT GAMES being particularly prominent.
這些SLOT GAME融合了豐富的故事情節和多樣的玩法，讓玩家每次遊玩都能體驗到: These SLOT GAMES integrate rich storylines and diverse gameplay, ensuring players experience different joys and surprises with every play.Whether seeking excitement or relaxation, {siteName}'s gaming world meets all your needs.
讓{siteName}成為你生活中的一部分: Make {siteName} a part of your life
{siteName}的目標市場不僅限於日本，更是放眼全球。: {siteName}'s target market extends beyond Japan to a global audience.
我們相信，無論你身處何地，: We believe that no matter where you are,
都能在{siteName}中找到屬於你的遊戲樂趣。: you can find your gaming enjoyment in {siteName}.
透過{siteName}，我們希望將快樂和興奮傳遞給每一位玩家。: Through {siteName}, we hope to deliver happiness and excitement to every player.
